publicDescription.space:
Complimentary Airport Transportation!  Restrictions apply.  

If you are a displaced family due to the Palisades or Eaton fire, please contact our office directly or write to us before booking so we can assist you with preferred pricing and accommodations.

Exclusive Partnerships Include:
• Erewhon Market – Stay Awhile offers pre-stock fridge services exclusively through Erewhon
• CURE Wellness – Members-only gym, spa, and wellness center in Malibu with exclusive access for Stay Awhile guests during their stay

Your private oasis on Malibu’s most coveted shoreline—Carbon Beach. Thoughtfully curated for those seeking a serene coastal retreat, this intimate escape features six ocean-side suites and one spacious main house with direct beach access and sweeping Pacific views.

Perfectly positioned for long beach walks, paddle boarding, kayaking, swimming, and sunbathing, the property invites you to unwind with oceanfront loungers on a sand-covered deck and alfresco dining for six beside a fully equipped grilling station.

Inside, the wide-open floor plan is designed for effortless relaxation and entertaining. Sink into oversized sofas in the main living area, complete with Apple TV, or craft your favorite drink at the full bar. Just steps away, a pool table adds to the lively atmosphere, while the chef-style kitchen impresses with high-end appliances, marble countertops, and generous prep space. Dine at the formal table for six or gather around the high-top island that seats eight.

The villa offers four luxurious ensuite bedrooms plus a bonus maid’s room—perfect for families or groups. Each bedroom is outfitted with hotel-quality linens, smart TVs, and generous storage, while glass doors welcome in fresh ocean air. Spa-style bathrooms feature Graft rain showers, LED vanity mirrors, Toto Neorest toilets, and thoughtful touches like cotton balls, q-tips, and toiletries.

The oceanside primary suite boasts a private hot tub just beyond its glass doors, with a lavish ensuite bathroom offering a separate soaking tub and refined finishes.

Malibu Sand is the epitome of coastal luxury. Walk straight from the sand to the Malibu Pier, Nobu, Soho House, and Surfrider Beach. The Malibu Country Mart and Whole Foods are just over a mile away—easily reached by foot or car.

From glowing sunsets to the sound of waves at night, every moment here invites you to immerse yourself in Malibu’s majestic beauty.

Unique Features
• Prime oceanfront location on Carbon Beach—Malibu’s most exclusive stretch of sand
• Private beach access with sun loungers, fire pit, and upper-level hot tub overlooking the Pacific
• Sleek indoor-outdoor design with panoramic views from every major room
• Four luxe ensuite bedrooms + bonus room, each with smart TVs and hotel-quality linens
• Custom bar, pool table, and spacious lounge for seamless entertaining
• Chef’s kitchen with oversized island, high-end appliances, and dual dining areas
• Designer bathrooms with rain showers, Toto smart toilets, and premium essentials
• Walk to Nobu, Soho House, Malibu Pier, and Surfrider Beach directly from the sand
• Access to Erewhon fridge-stocking + CURE Wellness gym & spa (exclusive to Stay Awhile guests)
• Concierge services and airport transportation available for a full 5-star experience

Coastal living at its best!

**All credit card payments are subject to a 3.55% processing fee, shown at checkout. A 3.55% processing fee also applies to any additional service charges, including pre-stocking, mid-stay cleaning, pool heating, and similar services. The guest name must match the name on the credit card. For international credit cards, an additional 1.5% may be charged after booking to account for exchange rate differences—bringing the total fee to approximately 4.7%. If you prefer not to incur this fee, payment by bank wire is available. Guests wishing to pay by bank wire must notify our team prior to booking so we can provide instructions and ensure the correct payment method is arranged.
publicDescription.access: Access to CURE Wellness and Gym is also included, conveniently located nearby (not onsite).
publicDescription.neighborhood: Property is located on Pacific Coast Highway. Guests are subject to hearing potential road noise and/or waves crashing\n\nDubbed "Billionaire's Beach" by locals, Carbon Beach has become one of the most popular and requested beaches in Malibu. Known for its long sandy beaches makes Carbon perfect for long walks on the beach, paddle boarding, kayaking, swimming, and sunbathing. You will be steps away from Nobu, the SoHo House, and seconds away from the sand. You can walk to Surfrider beach or the Malibu Pier from the beach access onsite, or you can walk a little further to the Country Mart for the best restaurants and shops in Malibu. There are always new shops opening nearly every day.
publicDescription.transit: Malibu Sand is located in the heart of Malibu within walking distance to the Malibu Pier and just steps away from Malibu's most iconic beach, Carbon Beach. The Malibu Country Mart is approx. 1.2 miles and is reachable by foot or car. We offer car rental services to its guests. Uber is readily available during peak season.
publicDescription.notes:
Please message our team and speak with the Home Manager before booking. Mandatory additional terms may apply depending on your booking platform. Credit card processing fee may be required post-booking. In case of cancellation, the stated booking cancellation policy applies.

To maintain property and neighborhood harmony, we have important rules. Please read carefully.

1) No parties, visitors, or unapproved guests. Submit all guest names before booking. Government ID may be requested from the person who booked. A guest is anyone who will spend any amount of time at the property. Our strict guest policy ensures neighborhood peace and legal compliance. Exceeding capacity risks our permit, we may ask you to leave. 

2) No pets allowed except for service animals as required by law.

3) No smoking, vaping, e-cigarettes, or similar (outside and indoors). Our state-of-the-art smoke detectors notify the fire department - $500 fee for false alarms or rule violations. City Code Section 41.50 B 18 b | High Brush Fire Zone | Prevent Wildfires | It’s the LAW. We are in a high brush fire zone. In effort to prevent wildfires the state can turn utilities on and off intermittently. Stay Awhile will not offer any refunds in this case.

4) Do not send mail to property before or after your reservation dates. If needed, send it to our office; we'll deliver to the property on your arrival day. We're not responsible for lost mail.

5) Quiet hours: 10:00pm to 8:00am to ensure peaceful atmosphere for all guests and neighbors. Property is located on Pacific Coast Highway. Guests are subject to hearing potential road noise and/or waves crashing.

7) Day of Arrival:
Let us know if you prefer self-check-in or a personal tour. Only the guest who booked can check in and must show their ID for security.

8) Check-In: We have a check-in window from 4:00pm to 6:00pm. Early check-in is based upon availability and will need to be approved by our team. Please keep this in mind as the day of your arrival approaches. If you are arriving later than 6pm, please reach out to our team for approval.

Check Out: 10:00am. Late checkout is based upon availability and needs to be approved in advance. Our late check-out fee is $100 for every hour after 10:00am. Additionally, if you want to check-out after 12:00 pm, then you will need to pay a fee equal to one full day. Please keep this in mind as the day of your departure approaches.

9) When you are departing the property, please make sure that you do not leave anything behind. Our team is not responsible for Lost or Stolen Items. If our team finds a lost item, we will ship it back to the guest. The guest will be responsible for paying the shipping cost plus a $50 service fee.

10) Pre-Stocking: Choose from our available pre-stocking options with at least one week's notice. A $95 service fee applies to all requests.

11) Hot tub: Never leave children unsupervised; no lifeguard on duty. No glassware; $1000 fee if glass is found. Use provided plasticware for safety. If kitchen lacks plasticware, please inform us. Please don't dispose of plasticware; wash and store them. If the hot-tub does not work well we will not offer a refund of more than $150 per day. 

12) Parking: Please park in the far-left two-car bay garage.

Cleanliness:
We take our cleaning seriously. You can trust that our homes are thoroughly deep cleaned between guest visits. All of our homes have white hotel-style linens, white towels, toiletries for our guests, and well stocked kitchens with high-end appliances. Amid COVID-19, our cleaning intensified: surfaces wiped with hot water and disinfectants. All towels and linens washed, regardless of appearance; many hotels don't. Door handles and high-touch spots get extra care. Staff wears masks, gloves, and shoe coverings. Our exceptional cleaning surpasses CDC standards.

This property contains an exterior camera at the front door which is motion sensored and is active during guests stay. 

We are a professional vacation rental hospitality management company. We maintain high hospitality standards with an in-house team of designers, concierge, hosts, maintenance personnel, and stylists. We are ranked #1 in California and #4 in the country. Travel can be stressful, especially when you book without seeing the home beforehand. We eliminate that stress.

Lastly, by the end of your stay with us, if you feel our service provided to you has been nothing less than excellent, gratuity is always welcome. Just give it to whomever you deem fit!
publicDescription.interactionWithGuests: Our dedicated team at Stay Awhile Villas is committed to ensuring your stay is seamless and unforgettable. We are available within reasonable hours to assist with any needs, provide local recommendations, and address any concerns you may have, ensuring a personalized and exceptional experience throughout your stay.
publicDescription.summary: A peaceful and serene reserve meticulously designed for luxury and relaxation, located in the heart of Malibu. Just steps away from feeling your toes in the sand! Enjoy the sound of the waves from the large pool-like hot tub on the upper deck overlooking the Pacific. This newly built villa offers 4 large hotel-style ensuite bedrooms. Spacious open floor plan with a stunning kitchen, comfortable living area, dining and pool table. A truly one of a kind vacation rental experience on Carbon Beach!

testimonials.body: Everything was great, we needed to extend our stay and our host made sure we were all taken care of. The view is incredible, and the house is beautiful. I would definitely come back here

Beautiful house, well maintained and very modern. I love the fact that you have direct access to the beach where you can just enjoy the scenery. My family loves the hot tub with the breathtaking view. We will definitely be back 😊
Very clean, amazing views, and had a great time. Thank you for having us

My family is fortunate to have enjoyed several beachfront rentals over the years. This property blew them all out of the water! The home is thoughtfully appointed with everything we needed for a great stay. The bedding is the most comfortable I’ve experienced in a short-term rental, The location is off the charts amazing with a fabulous private beach, walkable restaurants, and a short drive to various local attractions. We loved our meals at Vs and Nobu, and the outdoor mall just down the road made for a wonderful afternoon of relaxed shopping.

The host communication was outstanding throughout the stay with proactive updates and a quick response when we asked for support with a small maintenance issue. The professionalism of the management really showed.

Overall, an amazing stay for a family or couples looking for the perfect Malibu experience.
